 {"id":"gt-qvn7.4.3","title":"Deacon initialization with patrol molecule","description":"Ensure Deacon always has mol-deacon-patrol on hook.

## The Problem

When Deacon starts fresh, it needs:
1. mol-deacon-patrol bonded
2. Molecule pinned to hook
3. Ready to execute

## Solution: Bootstrap in gt prime

When gt prime runs for role=deacon:

1. Check if mol-deacon-patrol exists on hook
2. If not: bond it and pin it
3. Then show execution prompt

```go
// In prime.go for deacon role
if role == "deacon" && !hasPatrolOnHook() {
    // Bond the patrol formula
    bondDeaconPatrol()
    // Pin to hook
    pinToHook("deacon", patrolMolID)
}
```

## Alternative: Deacon Startup Hook

Or handle in Deacon SessionStart hook:
- Check hook
- If empty: gt mol bond mol-deacon-patrol && gt mol pin

## Files

- cmd/gt/prime.go (if handling in prime)
- deacon/hooks/session-start.sh (if handling in hook)","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:00.670376-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:00.670376-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-qvn7.4.3","depends_on_id":"gt-qvn7.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:00.672391-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"gt-qvn7.5.1","title":"End-to-end integration test","description":"Create and run end-to-end integration test.

## Test Scenario

1. Clean state: no polecats, fresh beads
2. Create test issue: simple documentation fix
3. Verify Deacon sees it: bd ready shows issue
4. Trigger Deacon: send heartbeat or wait
5. Verify spawn: gt polecats shows new polecat
6. Watch polecat work: tmux attach
7. Verify completion: issue closed, MR created

## Test Script

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# e2e-test.sh

# 1. Clean state
gt polecat remove --all
bd create "Test: update README typo" --type=task --priority=1

# 2. Verify ready
bd ready | grep "update README"

# 3. Wait for Deacon or trigger
# (manual for v0.1)

# 4. Watch
gt status
gt polecats gastown

# 5. Wait for completion
# (manual observation for v0.1)

# 6. Verify
bd list --status=closed | grep "update README"
```

## Success Criteria

- Issue created and visible in bd ready
- Polecat spawned and working
- Issue closed with commit reference
- No manual intervention (except observation)","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:20.642596-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:20.642596-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-qvn7.5.1","depends_on_id":"gt-qvn7.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:20.64439-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

## Changes Needed

### README.md

- Add "Experimental" or "Alpha" badge
- Clarify current state vs future vision
- List what works vs what is planned
- Include honest limitations section

### Architecture docs

- Mark autonomous features as "planned"
- Distinguish implemented from designed
- Add "Current Status" sections

### CLAUDE.md files

- Remove claims about autonomous operation (where not true)
- Add "v0.1" qualifiers to features
- Be honest about manual steps required

## Tone

NOT: "Gas Town automatically manages agent lifecycles"
YES: "Gas Town provides infrastructure for agent lifecycle management.
     v0.1 requires some manual coordination."

NOT: "The Refinery processes merges autonomously"
YES: "The Refinery is designed for autonomous merge processing.
     v0.1 demonstrates the pattern with manual triggering."

## Files to Review

- README.md
- docs/architecture.md
- docs/quickstart.md (if exists)
- CLAUDE.md files for all roles","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:32.215796-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-24T17:32:52.520522-08:00"}

 {"id":"gt-qvn7.5.3","title":"Demo recording","description":"Record a terminal demo of the tracer bullet.

## Recording Tool

Use asciinema:
```bash
brew install asciinema
asciinema rec gastown-demo.cast
```

## Demo Script

1. Show gt status (the town)
2. Show bd ready (available work)
3. Show Deacon running (tmux session)
4. Trigger spawn (create issue, Deacon picks it up)
5. Show polecat working (tmux attach briefly)
6. Show completion (bd list, issue closed)
7. Show MR created (bd list --type=merge-request)

## Tips

- Practice run first
- Keep it under 3 minutes
- Add commentary (terminal echo or voiceover)
- Show the key moments clearly

## Output

- gastown-demo.cast (asciinema file)
- gastown-demo.gif (optional, for embedding)
- YouTube/Vimeo upload (optional)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:43.630035-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:43.630035-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-qvn7.5.3","depends_on_id":"gt-qvn7.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-24T15:39:43.632383-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-qwin","title":"Refinery and witness rigs should redirect .beads to mayor rig","description":"The refinery's rig clone and witness rig clones should have their .beads directories redirect to the mayor's rig beads (like polecats do).

Current state:
- Polecats have .beads symlinked/redirected to mayor rig beads
- Refinery and witness have their own .beads (or none)

Desired state:
- refinery/rig/.beads -> mayor/rig/.beads (or equivalent redirect)
- witness/rig/.beads -> mayor/rig/.beads (or equivalent redirect)

This ensures all rig agents share the same issue tracking state.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T14:27:37.703044-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T14:27:37.703044-08:00"}
